data.description:
## Reproduction Steps
- tests/.../test_conflict_resolver_echo_suppression.py::test_echo_suppressed_for_identical_elements (L32-42): calls compute_mutations() but NEVER inspects its return; the only assert (L42) is ledger.is_echo(...) against an entry the test itself seeded at L36 — asserts a value just put in a map is in the map.
- test_zero_mutations_on_second_pass (L45-64): load-bearing assert is `not redundant or len(pass2) < len(pass1)` — passes vacuously when pass1 is empty; docstring promises ZERO but never asserts pass2 == [].

Expected: assertions exercise compute_mutations OUTPUT.
Actual: tests are tautological/vacuous — would pass if compute_mutations did nothing.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] test 1 asserts the seeded echo is ABSENT from the compute_mutations() return
- [ ] test 2 asserts pass2 == [] (not a vacuous inequality)
- [ ] both fail if echo-suppression is disabled (verify by temporarily breaking it)
data.title: Rewrite tautological conflict-resolver echo-suppression test
